hooks.command: try { $j = ($input | Out-String) | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $j.tool_input.file_path; if (-not $f) { $f = $j.tool_response.filePath }; if ($f -like '*.py') { & 'C:\Users\austi\Projects\Cartographer\source\backend\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m ruff check --fix $f } elseif ($f -like '*.ts' -or $f -like '*.tsx') { $env:Path = "C:\Program Files\nodejs;$env:Path"; Push-Location 'C:\Users\austi\Projects\Cartographer\source\frontend'; & '.\node_modules\.bin\eslint.cmd' --fix $f; Pop-Location } } catch { }

try { $j = ($input | Out-String) | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $j.tool_input.file_path; if (-not $f) { $f = $j.tool_response.filePath }; if ($f -like '*.py') { & 'C:\Users\austi\Projects\Cartographer\source\backend\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m ruff format $f } elseif ($f -like '*.ts' -or $f -like '*.tsx') { $env:Path = "C:\Program Files\nodejs;$env:Path"; Push-Location 'C:\Users\austi\Projects\Cartographer\source\frontend'; & '.\node_modules\.bin\prettier.cmd' --write $f; Pop-Location } } catch { }
